title: pyrus iranica
intro: Pyrus iranica, also known as the Iranian wild pear, is a species of pear tree native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Its extracts and leaves have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, constipation, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as to treat fever and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Pyrus iranica is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
